title: Caged
actors: Eleanor Parker, Agnes Moorehead, Ellen Corby
plot: A gentle, naive, pregnant 19-year-old widow is slowly, inexorably ground down by the hardened criminals, sadistic guards, and matron at a woman's prison. Will she be the same person when her sentence is up?
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 2 wins & 5 nominations total
